channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): New Mandelson revelations cast doubt on claim vetting decision was borderline, Thornberry says – UK politics live
item.description: New Mandelson revelations cast doubt on claim vetting decision was borderline, Thornberry says – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage
item.description: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson failed security vetting for US ambassador role over links to figures in China, Russia and Israel
item.description: Mandelson failed security vetting for US ambassador role over links to figures in China, Russia and Israel

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: One of David Cameron's great advantages is that he looked exactly like what you'd get if a casting agent was told to go and get someone to play a British Prime Minister.
item.description: One of David Cameron's great advantages is that he looked exactly like what you'd get if a casting agent was told to go and get someone to play a British Prime Minister.

item.title: The Telegraph: Get out! Blair declares war on Starmer - The Telegraph
item.description: Get out! Blair declares war on Starmer - The Telegraph

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Guardian (Open Platform): ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’: Burnham hits back at Blair’s Labour criticism
item.description: ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’: Burnham hits back at Blair’s Labour criticism

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham accuses Blair of ignoring inequality as he hits back at ex-PM
item.description: Burnham accuses Blair of ignoring inequality as he hits back at ex-PM

item.title: The Guardian: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel - The Guardian
item.description: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: EXCL: Peter Mandelson’s associations with senior figures in China, Russia and Israel were among concerns raised by the UK’s vetting agency when it concluded he should be denied clearance, sources tell Paul Lewis, me &...
item.description: EXCL: Peter Mandelson’s associations with senior figures in China, Russia and Israel were among concerns raised by the UK’s vetting agency when it concluded he should be denied clearance, sources tell Paul Lewis, me &...
